mapper.select: select count(*) from LEARNING_SCHEDULER ls /*inner join LEARNING_MODEL lm on ls.LEARNING_MODEL_ID = lm.ID*/

select
, lm.LEARN_NAME from LEARNING_SCHEDULER ls /* inner join LEARNING_MODEL lm on ls.LEARNING_MODEL_ID = lm.ID*/ where ls.DEL_AT = 'N' and ls.SCHED_ID = #{id}
mapper.update: update maummcc.LEARNING_SCHEDULER set SCHED_NM = #{schedNm}, HDQR_BOB_DCD = #{hdqrBobDcd}, TERM_TY = #{termTy}, ST_YMD = #{stYmd}, ST_TIME = #{stTime}, USE_AT = #{useAt}, MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = current_timestamp(), LEARNING_MODEL_ID = #{learningModelId} where SCHED_ID = #{schedId};
update maummcc.LEARNING_SCHEDULER set DEL_AT = 'Y', MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = current_timestamp(), where SCHED_ID = #{schedId};
mapper.sql: ls.SCHED_ID , ls.SCHED_NM , ls.HDQR_BOB_DCD , ls.USE_AT , ls.MOD_DT , ls.REG_ID , ls.REG_DT /*, ls.LEARNING_MODEL_ID*/ , ls.TERM_TY , ls.ST_YMD , ls.ST_TIME , ls.USE_AT , ls.TERM_TY , ls.ST_YMD , ls.ST_TIME , ls.USE_AT
mapper.select:
select count(*) from LEARNING_SCHEDULER ls where ls.TEMPLATE_ID in
#{item}
